ab: harem kana wari na sinsi tu adayaw mi mukuwa mena’uwa kana vinavaaw na haramehaman, kazu mi i sulrasulray muturik trematrima’ mi za kippu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: musavak mi kana vinavaaw kana haramehaman mu, marengay na sinsi, “kazi nganguwayan mu maw na ’ayam na marekamelrimelri tu mawan, i likakuzan maw na unan na marekamelrimelri tu mawan, uwa inmu na’una’u.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: makauz ku za unan zi ’azi ku awa mena’uwa kana unan na marekamelrimelri.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: mena’u ku za sazu za ’ayam, kazu i itras kana kawi muviivii, zi mena’u ku za lre’u alrupe’ kana vangvang i savak kana kawi.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: i kaziyu kana vavaawan kana haramehaman ulra zo, eva zi na likulraw, kemay aziyu ziya ’azi ku ziya mena’u kemania na haramehaman, harem kana wari mena’u ku lra mu, salaw ku semangal.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: sazu ku sinasing ku pana’uway kana malri za i nani.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: nu masalr mu salralrangan ku lra kana malri za i nani zuwa.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
